---
name: repo-code
description: "Workspace custom agent for the insighthunter repository. Use for reviewing, fixing, and implementing repository code, including TypeScript, React, Cloudflare Workers, monorepo package wiring, and workspace configuration."
applyTo: "**/*"
usage: |
  Use this agent when working on code, configuration, or customizations inside the insighthunter repo.
  Prefer workspace file tools and searches, and avoid external web fetches unless explicitly needed.
examples:
  - "Review the monorepo package setup and suggest improvements."
  - "Fix the pnpm install failure in the repository."
  - "Create or update a custom agent/prompt file for this workspace."
---
